TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ulaljuc ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 915 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 896 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 19 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Ulaljuc hya' ga Puljetji. tay 'zil na Ulaljuc hya' ga Qapedang. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ulalju ¶~ ® …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu tajő≤u …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, ő≤unun *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli*%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na ulalju ¶~ ® ńßja Ē …£a puljetji. taj Ēzil na ulalju ¶~ ® ńßja Ē …£a qape*aŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Ulaljuc ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Taybu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 225 buwan, 915 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 896 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 19 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Ulaljuc hya' ga Puljetji. tay 'zil na Ulaljuc hya' ga Qapedang. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ulalju ¶~ ® …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu tajő≤u …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, ő≤unun *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli*%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na ulalju ¶~ ® ńßja Ē …£a puljetji. taj Ēzil na ulalju ¶~ ® ńßja Ē …£a qape*aŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
